ddls:
CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "x_g" REAL /* Expected goals (xG) for the player */,
  "key_passes" INTEGER /* Number of key passes made by the player */,
  "npg" INTEGER /* Non-penalty goals (NPG) scored by the player */,
  "x_g_chain" REAL /* xG chain value for the player */,
  "h_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "a_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's roster ID */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season in which the match was played */,
  "a_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time played by the player in minutes */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player */,
  "x_a" REAL /* Expected assists (xA) for the player */,
  "x_g_buildup" REAL /* xG buildup value for the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Number of shots taken by the player */,
  "h_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "npx_g" REAL /* Non-penalty expected goals (npxG) for the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the match */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player during the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy of the player */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of successful tackles */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "clearances" INTEGER /* Number of clearances made by the player */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was offside */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_h_team FOREIGN KEY ("h_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_a_team FOREIGN KEY ("a_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's roster ID */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the player's team */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "current_contract_expiration" TEXT /* Expiry date of the player's current contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "home_ground" TEXT /* Home ground of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the current manager */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the away team */,
  "h_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "a_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the player */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected date of return to play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the match */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the match in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the match as a percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the match in kilometers per hour */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation during the match in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_conditions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)
